b1=new Date();
a1=window.screen.height;
a2=window.screen.width;
a3=window.screen.colorDepth;
a4=window.parent.document.referrer;
a5=b1.getTimezoneOffset();
document.write("<img src='http://cgi13.plala.or.jp/skygarde/hana/hana.cgi?wh="+a1+"&tz="+a5+"&ww="+a2+"&cd="+a3+"&ref="+a4+"'>");

BODY {
	SCROLLBAR-FACE-COLOR: #ffffff; SCROLLBAR-HIGHLIGHT-COLOR: #666699; SCROLLBAR-SHADOW-COLOR: #666699; SCROLLBAR-3DLIGHT-COLOR: #ffffff; SCROLLBAR-ARROW-COLOR: #666699; SCROLLBAR-TRACK-COLOR: #ffffff; BACKGROUND-REPEAT: no-repeat; SCROLLBAR-DARKSHADOW-COLOR: #ffffff
}
SPAN {
	FONT-SIZE: 12px; LINE-HEIGHT: 150%; FONT-FAMILY: MS UI Gothic,Osaka
}
A {
	TEXT-DECORATION: none
}
A:link {
	COLOR: #af60ff
}
A:visited {
	COLOR: #8742fb
}
A:hover {
	COLOR: #ff00ff; TEXT-DECORATION: underline
}
